---
title: "Why Priors Matter"
subtitle: "And what breaks if you ignore them"
---

*Draft pending — placeholder for the gate-sequence rebuild (the argumentative heart of Part III).*

**Planned:** base-rate neglect; paired success/failure mini-cases (same founder, prior vs. no prior); priors as "who we are." Make the case to a skeptical, distracted entrepreneur that they cannot ignore their prior.
